text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Well now, we certainly have a unique group of
runners in this year's spring Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
There's Mejiro Palmer, who showed us her
amazing talent in many G1 races last year!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Just you watch! I'm gonna carve the name
"Palmer" into this track.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Go, Palmer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then, in the peak of health, there's Ikuno Dictus!
Her era is just getting started!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: This time, I will claim victory.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Show everyone what you can really do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then, there's today's favorite, a runner
well-acquainted with the spring Tenno
Sho—Mejiro McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
By the honor of the Mejiro family, I shall not
allow anyone else to take this spring's Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to watch this year's race! Go, Mejiro
McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then we have the embodiment of hard work, the
Umamusume who caught everyone's eye at the
Kikuka Sho, Rice Shower!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Bourbon. I've come to fight... I've come to win!

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text: You can do it, Rice! I know you can!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And finally, there's the bundle of potential,
Matikanetannhauser!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Let's have fun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I've squeezed out every drop of power I've got for
today, so I'm juiced and ready to go!

text_block_list.name: Spectator E
text_block_list.text:
Oh! It's Matikanetannhauser! She ran in the
Classics last year, right?

text_block_list.name: Spectator F
text_block_list.text:
I saw her comments after her races too. They were
really something. She did really well in the
Diamond Stakes too.

text_block_list.name: Spectator E
text_block_list.text:
No kidding?! I wonder if she'll surprise us all with
a win today.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Okay! I've got this!

text_block_list.name: Spectator E
text_block_list.text: Show us what you've got, Matikanetannhauser!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho begins in a fiery clash
between all these Umamusume!
